'''Len Carlson''' was a voice actor born in [[Wikipedia:Canada|Canada]]. In [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']], he played a number of characters.

Carlson appeared on many shows for [[Nelvana]] like ''Rolie Polie Olie'', ''Cyberchase'', ''Pecola'', ''Donkey Kong Country'', and ''Beyblade''.

He died in his sleep of a heart attack at the age of 68 in 2006. The ''Cyberchase'' episode "Eco-Haven Ooze" was dedicated to his memory, as was the ''Atomic Betty'' episode "Takes One to Know One."
